name: Patna Emergency Care Centre
description: 24x7 emergency surgery including appendectomy and trauma stabilization. ICU with oxygen plant and ventilator support. Resident doctor and anesthesiologist available.
equipment: ICU; ventilator; oxygen plant; operation theatre
capability: Round the clock emergency and ambulance

name: Gaya Renal Clinic
description: Dialysis center with hemodialysis machines and visiting nephrologist. Day time only OPD. No ICU and no ventilator.

name: Rural Seva Hospital
description: Claims emergency care and operation theatre. Surgery listed but no anaesthesia information. Oxygen cylinder available. OPD hours only.

name: Kolkata Cancer Institute
description: Oncology hospital with chemotherapy and radiotherapy. ICU has oxygen and ventilator. Full-time doctors available 24 hours.
capability: Cancer care and inpatient critical support

name: Assam Newborn Care Unit
description: NICU and special newborn care unit with oxygen concentrators. No surgical emergency service. Visiting pediatrician.
